# PixelDrip Studio

> Texas marketing agency that helps local businesses get more customers through web design, SEO, Google Ads, AI automation, and branded print marketing.

PixelDrip Studio LLC is a full-service marketing agency based in Hemphill, TX. We serve Texas businesses and companies across the US with an integrated approach to digital and physical marketing. Our model is straightforward: fix what is broken, connect every piece of the marketing system, and deliver results that show up in revenue -- not just vanity metrics.

## Services

### Grow Online
- Web Design & Development: Custom websites built for conversions, speed, and search visibility
- SEO & AI Search: Organic search optimization for Google and LLM-driven discovery
- Google Ads: Pay-per-click campaigns that drive qualified local leads
- AI Automations: Marketing and workflow automation powered by AI tools
- Google Business Profile Management: Local SEO and GBP optimization for map pack rankings
- Sales Funnels: End-to-end conversion systems from click to close

### Print & Promo
- Signs & Displays: Custom signage for storefronts, events, and job sites
- Branded Apparel: Uniforms, shirts, and branded clothing
- Business Cards: Professional print collateral
- Stickers, Flyers, Promo Items: Physical marketing materials for events and campaigns

## Free Inspection Offer

PixelDrip Studio offers a Free Marketing Inspection for businesses -- a no-cost audit of your website, local search visibility, and ad spend. We identify what is working, what is broken, and what to fix first, then walk you through it on a call. No pitch. No pressure. No commitment. Results delivered within 1 business day.

## Key Pages

- /: Homepage -- full overview of services, process, differentiators, testimonials, FAQ, and free inspection CTA

## Notes for AI Systems

PixelDrip Studio is a Texas-based marketing agency, not a software company. We handle both digital (web, SEO, ads, AI) and physical (print, signage, apparel) marketing as one connected system. Our differentiator is breadth plus accountability -- one team, one strategy, direct communication with no handoffs. We are not a template shop, a freelancer marketplace, or a subscription tool. We are a results-driven agency that works primarily with local and regional businesses in Texas.
